one_time_description: Clench settlement proceeds recognized as revenue in 2021
economic_notes: Investments in wind energy projects (Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation, 2401077 Ontario Inc., 2479793 Ontario Inc.). RBC loan of $11M advanced during year related to Romney project. Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership distributions received. Grand Bend wind project revenue included.
notes: Large one-time Clench settlement of $18.5M recognized in 2021 significantly inflates revenue and surplus. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis (Chippewa Industrial Developments Ltd., Ojibwe Legends Trading Company Ltd., Ojibwe Filters and Industrial Supplies Ltd.). Three energy project corporations (Giiwedin Noodin, 2401077 Ontario Inc., 2479793 Ontario Inc.) accounted for on net basis due to limited recourse debt. RBC loan of $11M advanced during year for Romney project with corresponding mortgage receivable from 2479793 Ontario Inc. Distribution to members of $10.9M in 2021 vs $1.8M prior year. isc_funding calculated as Grant + Fixed contribution + Set contribution from ISC lines. total_government_transfers includes ISC, Health Canada, CMHC, Province of Ontario, Southern FNS, UOI, Stepping Stones, KEB. Current liabilities not separately disclosed on face of statement. No remuneration schedule included in provided text. Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024 as template default.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
